samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Combine flour, sugar, cocoa and baking soda in a large bowl
Make a and well in center and center
Add eggs, milk and oil and vanilla
Pour into greased and floured 9-inch square pan
Remove and frost with chocolate frosting Frosting
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, cocoa and baking soda in a large bowl
2. Make a and well in center and center
3. Add eggs, milk and oil and vanilla
4. Beat well
5. Stir in boiling water
6. Pour into greased and floured 9-inch square pan
7. Bake at 350 for 25 to 30 minutes
8. Cool completely
9. Remove and frost with chocolate frosting Frosting

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Add eggs and milk, oil and vanilla
Pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients
2. Add eggs and milk, oil and vanilla
3. Beat until smooth
4. Add boiling water or water
5. Stir until smooth. <
6. Pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
7. Bake 30 minutes for 25 to 25 350
8. Cool
9. Spread with icing
10. Yields 16 servings

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Sift flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt
Add in Large eggs milk, oil and vanilla
Bake and floured 9 pan at 350 degrees for 50 min
Frost with your favorite chocolate frosting
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt
2. Add in Large eggs milk, oil and vanilla
3. Beat till smooth
4. Pour mix in boiling water
5. Bake and floured 9 pan at 350 degrees for 50 min
6. Frost with your favorite chocolate frosting

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Mix flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
Beat together eggs, milk and oil
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients
Beat with an electric mixer until smooth
Add flour to the wet mixture
Pour batter into floured cookie sheet
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. Mix flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
3. Beat together eggs, milk and oil
4. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients
5. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth
6. Add boiling water
7. Add flour to the wet mixture
8. Pour batter into floured cookie sheet
9. Bake for 1 hour

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Spray pan or 9x13 pan baking oil
add eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
add 1 cup hot water, stir with spoon until just mixed
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Spray pan or 9x13 pan baking oil
3. mix dry ingredients in bowl
4. beat
5. add eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
6. add 1 cup hot water, stir with spoon until just mixed
7. bake
8. for 40-45 minutes

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: sift the dry ingredients together in a mixing bowl
pour into greased and floured 9x13 pan
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350F
2. sift the dry ingredients together in a mixing bowl
3. mix eggs and oil
4. add dry ingredients
5. mix with a hand mixer
6. add vanilla and boiling water
7. mix until well combined
8. pour into greased and floured 9x13 pan
9. bake
10. for about 30 mins
